DS18B20.h.name: select
DS18B20.h.description: Selects a device by its address.

practices.return value handling: Check non-zero for success

DS18B20.h.name: selectNext
DS18B20.h.description: Selects the next device on the bus.

practices.return value handling: Check non-zero for success

DS18B20.h.name: selectNextAlarm
DS18B20.h.description: Selects the next device with an alarm.

practices.return value handling: Check non-zero for success

DS18B20.h.name: resetSearch
DS18B20.h.description: Resets the search for devices.

practices.return value handling: No action needed

DS18B20.h.name: getTempC
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the temperature in Celsius.

practices.return value handling: Check for error codes

DS18B20.h.name: getTempF
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the temperature in Fahrenheit.

practices.return value handling: Check for error codes

DS18B20.h.name: getResolution
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the resolution of the selected device.

practices.return value handling: Handle based on expected resolution range

DS18B20.h.name: setResolution
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the resolution for the device.

practices.return value handling: No action needed

DS18B20.h.name: getPowerMode
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the power mode of the device.

practices.return value handling: Handle based on mode logic

DS18B20.h.name: getFamilyCode
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the family code of the device.

practices.return value handling: Check against known codes

DS18B20.h.name: getAddress
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the address of the selected device.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; create DS18B20 object before using.
practices.parameter usage: Pass properly allocated uint8_t array with size equal to 8.
practices.return value handling: Validate address content for expected values.

DS18B20.h.name: doConversion
DS18B20.h.description: Initiates a temperature conversion.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; initialize module prior to invocation.
practices.return value handling: Confirm operation via sensor readiness or data output.

DS18B20.h.name: getNumberOfDevices
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the number of devices on the bus.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; ensure initialization before use.
practices.return value handling: Verify returned value is non-negative and plausible.

DS18B20.h.name: hasAlarm
DS18B20.h.description: Checks if the selected device has an alarm.

practices.parameter usage: Invoke only for selected devices post-initialization.
practices.return value handling: Detect alarm status via returned value check (non-zero).

DS18B20.h.name: setAlarms
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the alarm temperature thresholds.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; perform device selection first.
practices.parameter usage: Example: setAlarms(-10, 50) for low and high settings.
practices.return value handling: Crosscheck alarm configuration accuracy through readings.

DS18B20.h.name: getAlarmLow
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the low alarm temperature threshold.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; utilize after alarm setup.
practices.return value handling: Store and confirm against pre-programmed threshold.

DS18B20.h.name: setAlarmLow
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the low alarm temperature threshold.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; invoke within sensor session.
practices.parameter usage: Example: setAlarmLow(5) sets the low threshold to 5.
practices.return value handling: Validate low alarm value registers correctly.

DS18B20.h.name: getAlarmHigh
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the high alarm temperature threshold.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; read after initialization and threshold setting.
practices.parameter usage: No arguments required to call function.
practices.return value handling: Compare retrieved values with stored thresholds.

DS18B20.h.name: setAlarmHigh
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the high alarm temperature threshold.

practices.parameter usage: Example: setAlarmHigh(40) to set high threshold.
practices.return value handling: Check high alarm threshold updated appropriately.

DS18B20.h.name: setRegisters
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the low and high alarm registers.

practices.API order: Include DS18B20.h; execute only after bus initialization.
practices.return value handling: Ensure correct thresholds are registered successfully.

DS18B20.h.name: getLowRegister
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the low alarm register value.

practices.return value handling: Handle returned 'int8_t' to evaluate low alarm threshold.

DS18B20.h.name: setLowRegister
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the low alarm register value.

practices.parameter usage: Example: ds.setLowRegister(20) to set low threshold.
practices.return value handling: None; ensure parameter is validated beforehand.

DS18B20.h.name: getHighRegister
DS18B20.h.description: Gets the high alarm register value.

practices.return value handling: Handle returned 'int8_t' to evaluate high alarm threshold.

DS18B20.h.name: setHighRegister
DS18B20.h.description: Sets the high alarm register value.

practices.parameter usage: Example: ds.setHighRegister(25) to set high threshold.
practices.return value handling: None; ensure parameter is validated beforehand.
